channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NCC] NCC Board Approves FY26 Results, ₹2.20 Dividend
item.description:
The Board of Directors of NCC Ltd approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. They recommended a dividend of ₹2.20 (110%) per equity share for FY26, subject to shareholder approval, with a record date of August 14, 2026. The board also approved the reappointment of Sri AV N Raju as Whole-time Director for five years and the appointment of Smt. Kauslya Bhupathi Raju as Director (Commercial) and Senior Management Personnel. Sri A Karthik was appointed as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer. Sri Rajender Mohan Malla was elected as Chairman of the Board effective May 24, 2026.

  • NCC Board approved audited financial results for FY26.
  • A dividend of ₹2.20 per share (110%) was recommended for FY26.
  • Sri AV N Raju reappointed as Whole-time Director for five years.
  • Smt. Kauslya Bhupathi Raju appointed as Director (Commercial).
  • Sri A Karthik appointed as Company Secretary & Compliance Officer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NCC Limited | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SENCO] Senco Gold: Burglary at Franchisee Showroom in West Bengal
item.description:
Senco Gold Ltd reports a burglary incident at its franchisee showroom in Dhuliyan, Murshidabad, West Bengal on May 14, 2026. An FIR has been lodged with the local police, and the insurance company has been notified. All employees are safe. The showroom operates under the FOFO model, with inventory owned by the franchisee, resulting in no inventory loss or financial impact on Senco Gold. The company is committed to supporting the franchisee.

  • Burglary occurred at Senco Gold's franchisee showroom in Dhuliyan, West Bengal.
  • No inventory loss or financial impact on Senco Gold due to FOFO model.
  • All employees at the affected showroom are safe and unharmed.
  • FIR lodged with local police; insurance company notified.
  • Senco Gold commits to supporting the franchisee during this time.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Senco Gold Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [RCCL] Rajasthan Cylinders Board Meeting on May 26, 2026
item.description:
Rajasthan Cylinders & Containers Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 26, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window remains closed until May 28, 2026, following the meeting.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 26, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve audited financial results for FY26.
  • Trading window closed until May 28, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajasthan Cylinders & Containers Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HSCL] Himadri Submits Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report 2025-26
item.description:
Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd has submitted its Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report (BRSR) for the financial year 2025-26, as per SEBI regulations. The report is part of the Integrated Annual Report 2025-26 and is available on the company's website. Himadri emphasizes sustainability, innovation, and resilience as key to long-term value creation, focusing on environmental stewardship, social responsibility, and strong governance aligned with global frameworks.

  • Himadri submits BRSR for FY 2025-26, emphasizing sustainability.
  • Company focuses on innovation in next-generation materials and circular economy.
  • Environmental strategy includes energy efficiency and zero liquid discharge.
  • Prioritizes occupational health and safety, aiming for zero LTIFR.
  • ESG governance is anchored at the Board level, aligned with global frameworks.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd | Category: ESG

item.title: [INDXTRA] IEL Ltd Board Meeting on 23/05/2026 to Approve Results
item.description:
IEL Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 23, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Standalone Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's equity shares has been closed since March 18, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the results.

  • IEL Ltd's board will meet on May 23, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Audited Standalone Financial Results for FY26 will be considered.
  • Trading window closed until 48 hours post-results declaration.
  • Meeting is pursuant to SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: IEL Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [YASHHV] Yash Highvoltage: Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Yash Highvoltage Ltd has submitted the auditor's report along with the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The results were approved by the Board of Directors on May 13, 2026, and are available on the company's website. The auditor's report includes an opinion on the consolidated annual financial results, stating they present a true and fair view in accordance with Indian accounting standards.

  • Audited standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26 submitted.
  • Board approved results on May 13, 2026.
  • Auditor's report included with the financial results.
  • Results available on the company's website www.yashhv.com.
  • Group adopted Indian Accounting Standards (Ind AS) for the first time during the year ended 31 March 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Yash Highvoltage Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SURBHIN] Surbhi Industries: RPT Disclosure Not Applicable for Q4 FY26
item.description:
Surbhi Industries Ltd. announces that the disclosure requirements for Related Party Transactions (RPT) are not applicable for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This is due to the company meeting the criteria outlined in Regulation 15(2) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015, specifically regarding companies with paid-up equity share capital and net worth below specified thresholds.

  • RPT disclosure not applicable for Surbhi Industries for Q4 FY26.
  • Exemption based on Regulation 15(2) of SEBI Listing Regulations.
  • Company meets criteria for exemption based on capital and net worth.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SURBHI INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [IMAGICAA] Imagicaaworld Entertainment FY26: Revenue ₹359.01 Mn
item.description:
Imagicaaworld Entertainment Ltd's audited standalone financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, show revenue from operations at ₹359.01 million compared to ₹409.99 million in the previous year. The company reported a profit after tax of ₹200.48 million for the year, a decrease from ₹777.92 million in the previous year. Basic and diluted earnings per share stood at ₹0.35.

  • Revenue from operations for FY26 stood at ₹359.01 million.
  • Profit after tax for FY26 was reported as ₹200.48 million.
  • Basic and diluted earnings per share were ₹0.35.
  • Total income for the year ended March 31, 2026, was ₹381.15 million.
  • Total expenses for FY26 amounted to ₹353.67 million.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Imagicaaworld Entertainment Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [IISL] Ishaan Infra reports FY26 Loss of ₹23.54 Lakh
item.description:
Ishaan Infrastructures and Shelters Ltd declared audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved the standalone financial results in a meeting held on May 15, 2026. The company reported a loss of ₹23.54 Lakh for the year ended March 31, 2026, compared to a profit of ₹1.70 Lakh in the previous year. The statutory auditors, M/s. Prakash Tekwani & Associates, issued unmodified opinions on the financial statements.

  • Ishaan Infra's board approved audited financial results for FY26 on May 15, 2026.
  • The company reported a loss of ₹23.54 Lakh for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Statutory auditors issued unmodified opinions on the financial statements.
  • Cash and Cash Equivalents as at end of the year stood at ₹1.21 Lakh.
  • Other current assets decreased from ₹685.33 Lakh to ₹655.16 Lakh.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ishaan Infrastructures and Shelters Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SAHLIBHFI] Shalibhadra Finance Board Meeting on May 28, 2026
item.description:
Shalibhadra Finance Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 28, 2026, to consider and approve the Standalone Audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a dividend, if any. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities is closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the results are made public.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 28, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Standalone Audited Financial Results for Q4 & FY26 will be considered.
  • Dividend recommendation to be discussed at the meeting.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until after results announcement.
  • Directors and designated employees advised not to trade in company securities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHALIBHADRA FINANCE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
